chunks.title: Babylonian Envoys Visit Hezekiah
chunks.reason: Describes the arrival of Babylonian envoys and Hezekiah's display of his treasures.

chunks.title: Hezekiah Reports to Isaiah
chunks.reason: Records the conversation between Hezekiah and Isaiah regarding the visitors.

chunks.title: Prophecy of Babylonian Exile
chunks.reason: Contains Isaiah's prophetic declaration about future treasures and sons being taken to Babylon.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Acceptance of the Word
chunks.reason: Records Hezekiah's response to the prophecy and his reasoning for accepting it.
